Dáin can be found at Durin's Stone. Dáin has been forced to rebuke King Thráin with a tale of the aftermath of Azog's slaying. You should listen to Dá…
Dáin can be found in the First Hall of Khazad-dûm. Dáin is recounting his tale of entering the First Hall of Khazad-dûm. You should talk to Dáin.
King Thráin can be found at Durin's Stone. After Thorin gave his counsel, King Thráin and the other Kings of the Seven Houses have agreed to the war's…
King Thráin has set the Dwarves of the Haban'akkâ on a grim task. You should aid the Haban'akkâ.

King Thráin might be found by the banks of Kheled-zâram. After preparing the final pyres at Azanulbizar, Thorin has asked you to find King Thráin.
King Thráin can be found by the banks of Kheled-zâram near Durin's Stone. You have found King Thráin at the banks of Kheled-zâram. Speak with him.

King Thráin can be found at Durin's Stone. You should talk to King Thráin.
The pyres can be found at Durin's Stone. King Thráin has asked you to join him in lighting the final pyres at Durin's Stone.
